---
title: "02_binning"
author: "Aiden Bennett"
date: "2026-07-14"
output: html_document
---

### --- Step 2 - Binning ---
This is the second step, which will handle the binning of the assembly with metabat.

We will move back to the highest directory of our project before starting, then make and move into a new directory called metabat. It should be contained within the marine-genomics directory.

Now run this series of commands to get the metabat output

Extract depth information
'cat ../flye/bbd/assembly_info.txt  | grep -v '#' | awk '{OFS="\t";print $1,$3}' > depths_bbd.txt'

Reorder contigs based on depth
'cat depths_bbd.txt | awk '{print $1}' | xargs samtools faidx ../flye/bbd/assembly.fasta > assembly_bbd_ordered.fasta'

Run metabat
'metabat2 -i assembly_bbd_ordered.fasta -a depths_bbd.txt --cvExt -o bins_bbd/metabat --seed 5'

75 bins should be formed, with 39874971 total bases. That is it for step 2, now move on to the final step, to check the bin quality with checkm.
